query: SELECT 'users' as tabela, id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Carol%' OR email LIKE '%carol%' UNION ALL SELECT 'clients' as tabela, id, nome as name, email, NULL as role FROM clients WHERE nome LIKE '%Carol%' OR email LIKE '%carol%';
